data.name: SAF0001_MessageFormat
data.value: Parameter '{0}' (method '{1}') is missing [ToolParameter] attribute; the Agent cannot obtain parameter description

data.name: SAF0001_Description
data.value: All parameters of methods marked [AgentTool] should have [ToolParameter] attribute so the Agent knows each parameter's purpose.

data.name: SAF0002_Title
data.value: Non-Agent method parameter should not use [ToolParameter]

data.name: SAF0002_MessageFormat
data.value: Parameter '{0}' (method '{1}') has [ToolParameter] but the method is not marked [AgentTool]; the attribute is ineffective

data.name: SAF0002_Description
data.value: [ToolParameter] is only effective on methods marked [AgentTool]; remove it from non-Agent methods.

data.name: SAF0003_Title
data.value: Localization key not found in resource file

data.name: SAF0003_MessageFormat
data.value: {2} '{0}' localization key '{1}' not found in Localization.resx (isLocalize=true)

data.name: SAF0003_Description
data.value: When [AgentTool]/[ToolParameter] specifies isLocalize=true, the localization key must exist in the project's Localization.resx file.
